gate_report.case: CTH-like external VMEC modified-protocol high-grid admission

gates.notes: High-grid admission is only meaningful as an exception to a failed full-grid ladder.
The full-grid gate may fail only grid-difference metrics, not stationarity/sample gates.
Every excluded grid must be present in the failed full-grid ladder.
The retained high grids must also be present in the failed full-grid ladder.
Every retained high-grid convergence gate used for admission must pass.
Every high-grid gate must use exactly the retained-grid labels.
Highest-grid common-window heat-flux means must agree under the production threshold.
Highest-grid least-trending-window heat-flux means must agree under the production threshold.
Late high-grid horizons must be stable before coarse-grid exclusion can be considered.
High-grid averaged common-window means must be stable across late final times.
High-grid averaged least-window means must be stable across late final times.
A seed/timestep replicated late transport window must pass.
At least three replicated reports are required for this scoped exception.
Replicate means must be finite.
Seed/timestep spread of late-window means.
Combined uncertainty estimate normalized by the ensemble mean.
Admission must not be based on startup/noise-floor heat flux.
